text.divine.hud_editor.title: Divine HUD Editor
text.divine.hud_editor.instruction.toggl: <highlight>Right Click</highlight> widgets to toggle them on/off.
text.divine.hud_editor.instruction.reset: <highlight>Shift + Right Click</highlight> widgets to reset their position.
text.divine.hud_editor.instruction.grid_: Hold <highlight>Ctrl</highlight> and <highlight>Scroll</highlight> to adjust grid size.
text.divine.widget.tracker.title: Divine Golem // Tracker
